popup.title: Create a designed template using artificial intelligence
popup.placeholder: Describe the desired newsletter style (for example: "Summer sale - colorful and playful, 3 product blocks, large call-to-action button)"
popup.lastPromopSubTitle: The design process will continue from this point

tips.title: Details for better results
tips.toneDesc: Specify the desired tone (bold, minimalist, elegant, fun, professional)
tips.elementsDesc: Specify colors or visual style you would like to incorporate
tips.specificDesc: Specify the topic (sale, event, season) and the purpose of the newsletter
tips.structureDesc: Detail the structure (headline, product grid, button, image, footer)
tips.fileTextPlaceholder: e.g: Take the colors from the attached file

popup.editPlaceholder: Describe the changes you'd like to make to the design. For example: "Replace all colors with green tones", "Increase the size of all headings"

tooltip.continuePrompt: The design process will continue from this point
tooltip.loadTemplate: The editor will load the result you received for this prompt

responses.400: There was an issue with the format or content of your request
responses.413: Request exceeds the maximum allowed number of bytes
responses.429: Your account has hit a rate limit
responses.500: An unexpected error has occurred internal
